entries.statement: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including scoping the question, selecting methodology, performing analysis, and delivering findings with documented assumptions and limitations.
Extract and collect data from relational databases, APIs, data warehouses, and external sources, writing and optimizing queries to support analytical workflows.
Transform, clean, and prepare data for analysis, including joining disparate sources, handling missing values, normalizing formats, and validating data integrity before analytical use.
Perform exploratory data analysis to identify distributions, outliers, patterns, and relationships that inform hypothesis generation and methodology selection.
Build and validate statistical models for business applications, including model specification, parameter estimation, diagnostic evaluation, and performance assessment against business criteria.
Design and analyze controlled experiments, including hypothesis specification, sample size calculation, randomization oversight, results interpretation, and recommendation delivery.
Execute segmentation analyses that produce actionable customer, product, or operational groupings, including cluster validation and segment profiling for business use.
Perform time series analysis and forecasting, including trend identification, seasonality decomposition, model fitting, accuracy evaluation, and communication of forecast uncertainty.
Design and execute quantitative analyses for high-stakes business decisions, including methodology selection, sensitivity analysis, and uncertainty quantification.
Perform cost-benefit and trade-off analyses that quantify competing options and present decision-relevant comparisons to stakeholders.

Conduct market research and competitive analysis using quantitative and qualitative methods, including survey design, secondary data analysis, and synthesis of findings into strategic recommendations.
Perform geospatial analysis, including spatial joins, distance calculations, area aggregations, and presentation of location-based findings through maps and spatial visualizations.
Build data visualizations that accurately represent analytical findings, selecting appropriate chart types and applying design principles that minimize misinterpretation.
Design, build, and publish BI dashboards and reports that meet defined consumer requirements for content, layout, performance, accessibility, and refresh frequency.
Build and maintain self-service analytical experiences that enable business stakeholders to monitor KPIs and explore data without analyst intervention.
Design and maintain BI semantic models, including star schema construction, measure definition, hierarchy design, and optimization for query performance.
Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data model updates, incremental refresh configuration, and deprecation of unused content.
Construct data narratives that translate analytical findings into business context, structuring presentations with appropriate evidence and detail calibrated to the audience.
Communicate analytical findings to executive stakeholders, demonstrating how data and analytics initiatives address organizational challenges and inform strategic decisions.
Document analytical methodologies, data sources, business rules, transformation logic, and known data limitations for all recurring analyses and reports.
Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for regulatory, audit, or executive decision support contexts.
Define and govern metrics and KPI definitions, including measurement methodology, ownership, refresh cadence, and consistency of interpretation across business units.
Perform data profiling and quality assessment, including completeness checks, consistency validation, accuracy measurement, and documentation of data quality impacts on analytical conclusions.
Manage BI platform governance, including report certification workflows, access control maintenance, content lifecycle reviews, and version control for BI assets.
Monitor data pipeline and analytical system health dashboards, respond to alerts per defined runbooks, perform initial triage, escalate when needed, and document incidents.

Implement and maintain automated tests for data pipelines and analytical outputs, including unit tests for transformations, integration tests for end-to-end flows, and regression tests for key metrics.
Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, stakeholder communication, and deliverable scheduling across business units.
Gather and translate stakeholder analytical requirements into technical specifications, prototyping analytical solutions iteratively and validating outputs against business needs.
Mentor junior analysts through code and methodology review, feedback delivery, and progressive skill development aligned to analytical competency expectations.
Evaluate the impact of regulatory, policy, or procedural changes on analytical operations and reporting requirements, updating processes and documentation accordingly.
